rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code residence homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §38.051, which governs establishment of school-based health centers. No overlapping subject matter or dependency exists.
quote: A school district in this state may, if the district identifies the need, design a model in accordance with this subchapter for the delivery of cooperative health care programs for students and their families and may compete for grants awarded under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school-based health centers, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
